title: Want to embed an Iframe in Monday?

posts.author: MabRoj (Mabel Rojas)
posts.cookedHtml:
What apps do you want to see?
You can think think of an inline frame (or iFrame) as a window in Monday looking out on another piece of online content. It will allow you to maintain separation between Monday and the external content you’re loading into it.
We would love to know about the apps you want to see!
